name: Soldier Killer
short_description: Soldier Killer is a simple game based on killing opponents. You are a member of a secret organization and you have the task of liquidating all those who have betrayed the organization.
detailed_description:
You are a member of a secret organization that has given you the job of killing all the soldiers who have betrayed the organization. An organization you do not know anything about, your memory has been temporarily wiped out for security reasons.
The main task is to kill all the soldiers. Remember that soldiers have different rankings, so they have different skill levels. But everyone has their weaknesses. Discover them for easier task execution.
about_the_game:
